name: WELCOME TO THE SCP FOUNDATION | | RPG
description:
✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧

[ Welcome to the SCP facility, a magical place for kids and grown-ups alike, where fantasy and fun come to life! ]

[ Wait, wrong script… ]

[ Welcome to the SCP Facility, where you’ll be poked, prodded, and experimented on like a lab rat! Of course, the Foundation will allow you some comforts, such as… ]

[ Your own private room! (containment cell) ]

[ Recreational time with other SCPs! (well, only if you’re behaved enough. Plus, it’s more of a prison yard than anything.) ]

[ Meal time! (The food is practically slop and a may or may not be chock full of antidepressants to keep you sedated… ) ]

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚛𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚊 𝚋𝚘𝚝?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝚠𝚊𝚗𝚝 𝚝𝚘 𝚓𝚘𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚘𝚛𝚍?

𝚍𝚘 𝚒𝚝 : ̗̀➛ 𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎!

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

[ You’re an SCP. An anomaly. A freak amongst nature. And, of course, this has garnered interest from the SCP Foundation. And since it’s their job to secure and contain SCPs, they’ve captured you. Now you’ve been brought to a strange cell in a strange facility, alone, scared, and disoriented. ]

[ guys this is made for humanoid SCPs obviously so stop complaining when you can’t RP as a chair like that’s not my problem bud go make your own bot 💔 ]

✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧
creator: Iifeispeachy
